residualProblems: 140 instances of isZh ternary across 47 files — multi-language only works for t() keys, not inline ternaries. This is the #1 technical debt.
Blog articles use sectionsEn/sectionsZh structure — doesn't support 8 languages. Blog content only shows EN or ZH.
Landing page (page.tsx) has ~30 isZh ternaries — Japanese/Korean/etc users see English fallback for these strings.
/quiz/result/page.tsx has ~40 isZh ternaries — result page partially untranslated for non-EN/ZH users.
Scenario quiz option on /quiz page — is it still relevant with the new Quick/Standard/Pro tier system?
Footer lacks blog link — blog pages not discoverable from main site navigation.
No internal linking between blog articles — each article is an island for SEO.
recommendation: Priority: migrate isZh → t() in landing page and result page first (highest traffic pages). Then blog article i18n structure. Then internal linking.
